attacking_style: Initiates decisive moves 6km out on mountain-top finishes, often bridging solo to breakaways before launching short-range attacks with <1km remaining. Shows willingness to attack early in stage races to defend GC position.
team_tactics: Operates as domestique-GC hybrid with inconsistent team protection; frequently isolated doing chase work himself. UAE has abandoned him when mechanicals occur, revealing he's not the protected leader. Most effective when nursed by single domestique before solo bridge efforts.
terrain_preference: Strong on sustained mountain climbs with technical descents; underrated short TT capability (10th at Worlds TT, beat Küng/Ganna). Exposed in echelons and crosswinds, vulnerable to explosive accelerations on steep gradients despite steady climbing power.
vulnerability: Cannot follow explosive attacks from top climbers (lost 11sec to podium despite team support). Completely exposed in wind/echelons (lost 2:05 in Paris-Nice crosswinds). Weak when required to sustain maximum pace with grupetto, poor sprint positioning fundamentals.
key_patterns: Bridges large gaps solo (5+ minutes to breakaway at Vuelta 2022) forcing rivals to chase
Loses time in final mountain stages to explosive climbers, suggests durability fade over 3 weeks
Strong crash recovery and chase-back capacity demonstrated multiple times across GTs
Excels on technical gravel descents, only UAE rider willing to descend aggressively (Catalunya 2022 win)
Consistently isolated by team, performs disproportionate chase work despite being on GC
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 Vuelta showed complete role breakdown, struggling in domestique duties and abandoned post-mechanical. Gap widening between steady GC capability and explosive top-tier climbing.
